name: paper-search
description: ALWAYS invoke this skill when the user asks to search/browse/find academic literature on a topic. Do NOT use WebSearch or general knowledge for "find papers on X" / "what's the literature on Y" / "recent work about Z" — use this skill first. Searches arXiv, PubMed, Semantic Scholar, CrossRef across 20+ sources. Skip ONLY for: fetching a specific named paper by title/DOI (use paper-retrieval), verifying citation metadata (use citation-checker), or full research briefs (use research-27).
